title: elaeagnus pungens f. rotundifolia
intro: Elaeagnus pungens f. rotundifolia, also known as Silverberry or Wolfberry, is a shrub native to China and Japan, characterized by its silvery-gray foliage and small, white flowers. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elaeagnus pungens f. rotundifolia include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
